mapper.sql: do_id, pco_id, pco_item, sign_warehouse_code, ro_id, yy_batchId, hand_flag, hand_msg, create_time, order_id, order_item, num, ass_num, do_source, inventory_table_type, opt_status, yy_orderNo, remark, shelf_no, shelf_model_no, shelf_qty
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.abnormal_create_db
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.abnormal_create_db (do_id, pco_id, pco_item, sign_warehouse_code, ro_id, yy_batchId, hand_flag, hand_msg, create_time, order_id, order_item, num, ass_num, do_source, inventory_table_type, opt_status, yy_orderNo, remark, shelf_no, shelf_model_no, shelf_qty ) values (#{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{signWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{yyBatchid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{handFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{handMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{assNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{doSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{optStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{yyOrderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{shelfNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shelfModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shelfQty,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

do_id,
pco_id,

mapper.update:
update dbo.abnormal_create_db
do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pco_id = #{record.pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pco_item = #{record.pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sign_warehouse_code = #{record.signWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ro_id = #{record.roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
yy_batchId = #{record.yyBatchid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hand_flag = #{record.handFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
hand_msg = #{record.handMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
num = #{record.num,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ass_num = #{record.assNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
do_source = #{record.doSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_table_type = #{record.inventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
opt_status = #{record.optStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
yy_orderNo = #{record.yyOrderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
shelf_no = #{record.shelfNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shelf_model_no = #{record.shelfModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shelf_qty = #{record.shelfQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo.abnormal_create_db set do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pco_id = #{record.pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pco_item = #{record.pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sign_warehouse_code = #{record.signWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ro_id = #{record.roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, yy_batchId = #{record.yyBatchid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hand_flag = #{record.handFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, hand_msg = #{record.handMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, num = #{record.num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ass_num = #{record.assNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, do_source = #{record.doSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_table_type = #{record.inventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, opt_status = #{record.optStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, yy_orderNo = #{record.yyOrderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, shelf_no = #{record.shelfNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, shelf_model_no = #{record.shelfModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, shelf_qty = #{record.shelfQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.abnormal_create_db
pco_id = #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pco_item = #{pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sign_warehouse_code = #{signWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ro_id = #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
yy_batchId = #{yyBatchid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hand_flag = #{handFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
hand_msg = #{handMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
num = #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ass_num = #{assNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
do_source = #{doSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_table_type = #{inventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
opt_status = #{optStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
yy_orderNo = #{yyOrderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
shelf_no = #{shelfNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shelf_model_no = #{shelfModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shelf_qty = #{shelfQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where do_id = #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.abnormal_create_db set pco_id = #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pco_item = #{pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sign_warehouse_code = #{signWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ro_id = #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, yy_batchId = #{yyBatchid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hand_flag = #{handFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, hand_msg = #{handMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, num = #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ass_num = #{assNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, do_source = #{doSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_table_type = #{inventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, opt_status = #{optStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, yy_orderNo = #{yyOrderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, shelf_no = #{shelfNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, shelf_model_no = #{shelfModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, shelf_qty = #{shelfQty,jdbcType=INTEGER} where do_id = #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
